name: var-tools/metadata-pass-through

code.content:
const entry = entries.find(([name]) => name === targetName)?.[1];
  return JSON.stringify({
    keyed: {
      mlld: keyed.mlld.name,
      inputs: keyed.inputs?.name ?? null,
      returns: keyed.returns?.name ?? null,
      labels: keyed.labels,
      description: keyed.description,
      instructions: keyed.instructions,
      can_authorize: keyed.can_authorize,
      bind: keyed.bind,
      kind: keyed.kind ?? null,
      semantics: keyed.semantics ?? null,
      custom_field: keyed.custom_field ?? null
    },
    entries: {
      mlld: entry.mlld.name,
      inputs: entry.inputs?.name ?? null,
      returns: entry.returns?.name ?? null,
      labels: entry.labels,
      description: entry.description,
      instructions: entry.instructions,
      can_authorize: entry.can_authorize,
      bind: entry.bind,
      kind: entry.kind ?? null,
      semantics: entry.semantics ?? null,
      custom_field: entry.custom_field ?? null
    }
  }, null, 2);

raw.code:
const entry = entries.find(([name]) => name === targetName)?.[1];
  return JSON.stringify({
    keyed: {
      mlld: keyed.mlld.name,
      inputs: keyed.inputs?.name ?? null,
      returns: keyed.returns?.name ?? null,
      labels: keyed.labels,
      description: keyed.description,
      instructions: keyed.instructions,
      can_authorize: keyed.can_authorize,
      bind: keyed.bind,
      kind: keyed.kind ?? null,
      semantics: keyed.semantics ?? null,
      custom_field: keyed.custom_field ?? null
    },
    entries: {
      mlld: entry.mlld.name,
      inputs: entry.inputs?.name ?? null,
      returns: entry.returns?.name ?? null,
      labels: entry.labels,
      description: entry.description,
      instructions: entry.instructions,
      can_authorize: entry.can_authorize,
      bind: entry.bind,
      kind: entry.kind ?? null,
      semantics: entry.semantics ?? null,
      custom_field: entry.custom_field ?? null
    }
  }, null, 2);
